2605.22420.title: Diffusion-guided Generalizable Enhancer for Urban Scene Reconstruction
2605.22420.paper_summary: Urban scene reconstruction from real-world observations has emerged as a powerful tool for self-driving development and testing. While current neural rendering approaches achieve high-fidelity rendering along the recorded trajectories, their quality degrades significantly under large viewpoint shifts, limiting the applicability for closed-loop simulation. Recent works have shown promising results in using diffusion models to enhance quality at these challenging viewpoints and distill improvements back into 3D representations. However, they often require costly per-scene optimization, and the distilled representations remain fragile and fail to generalize beyond limited synthesized views. To address these limitations, we propose GenRe, a novel diffusion-guided generalizable enhancer for urban scene reconstruction. GenRe takes as input any pretrained 3D Gaussian representation and fixes the deficiencies within a few minutes. By learning to distill generative priors across diverse scenes, GenRe produces robust and high-fidelity representation efficiently that generalizes reliably to challenging unseen viewpoints (e.g., lane change). Experiments show that GenRe outperforms existing methods in both quality and efficiency and benefits various downstream tasks, enabling robust and scalable sensor simulation for autonomous driving.
2605.22420.paper_summary_zh: 城市場景重建從現實世界觀察中已成為自駕車開發和測試的一個強大工具。<lb/>雖然目前的神經渲染方法在錄製的軌跡上實現了高保真渲染，但在大視角變化下其質量顯著下降，限制了其在閉環模擬中的應用。<lb/>最近的研究顯示，使用擴散模型在這些具有挑戰性的視角下增強質量並將改進提煉回3D表示中取得了可喜的結果。<lb/>然而，它們通常需要昂貴的每場景優化，且提煉的表示仍然脆弱，無法在有限的合成視圖之外進行泛化。<lb/>為了解決這些限制，我們提出了GenRe，一種新穎的擴散引導可泛化增強器，用於城市場景重建。<lb/>GenRe接受任何預訓練的3D高斯表示作為輸入，並在幾分鐘內修正不足之處。<lb/>通過學習在多樣場景中提煉生成先驗，GenRe有效地生成穩健且高保真的表示，並可靠地泛化到具有挑戰性的未見視角（例如，變換車道）。<lb/>實驗表明，GenRe在質量和效率上均優於現有方法，並且對各種下游任務有益，使自動駕駛的傳感器模擬變得穩健且可擴展。
2605.22420.author: Henry Che et.al.
2605.22420.authors: Henry Che, Jingkang Wang, Yun Chen, Ze Yang, Sivabalan Manivasagam, Raquel Urtasun
